title: reportsystem
description: a report system made by fynnlukah
body:
## Plugin Description:
This plugin is a simple report system which sends the reports towards a discord webhook, which can be setup in config.yml after restarting the server once.

## Permissions:
reportsystem.recieve (Customizable in config.yml, requires a server restart or a plugin restart using /reload confirm)

## Commands:
/report <player> <reason>

/reloadreport
